utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies five items: (1) health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), (2) property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), (3) travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), (4) additional_services (enhancement services with costs), and (5) total_budget (complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). In the final plan, all five sections are present. Now checking completeness: (1) health_coverage — fully detailed with both physical and mental health coverage and specific monthly cost; ✅ fully specified. (2) property_coverage — present with coverage details but missing costs; ⚠️ partially specified, missing cost info, so not fully specified. (3) travel_coverage — detailed coverage but no cost; ⚠️ not fully specified. (4) additional_services — listed services but no costs; ⚠️ not fully specified. (5) total_budget — includes both monthly and annual cost breakdown; ✅ fully specified. Therefore, 2 out of 5 items are fully specified with all required cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final coverage plan includes three main categories: health_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Plan for both physical and mental health), property_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Coverage equivalent), and travel_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Plan). In the ground-truth ratings, the relevant ratings are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) = 9, LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) = 9, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (property) = 9, and LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) = 9. Additional services such as telemedicine, wellness programs, gym reimbursement, and priority claims correspond to separate enhancement ratings where applicable: Telemedicine Services = 8, Wellness Programs = 3, Gym Membership Reimbursement = 4. Priority claims and multilingual/global assistance are part of general services (Premium Insurance Membership rated 6) but not explicitly listed, so only directly matched items are included.
